nasb.text: Then the Lord God said to the woman, “What is this you have done?” And the woman said, “The serpent deceived me, and I ate.”

esv.text: Then the Lord God said to the woman, “What is this that you have done?” The woman said, “The serpent deceived me, and I ate.”

cnv.text: 耶和華　神對女人說：“你作了甚麼事呢？”女人說：“那蛇欺哄我，我就吃了。”

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝对女人说：“你这做的是什么事？”女人说：“是蛇诱骗我，我才吃的。”

csbs.text: 耶和华神对女人说：“你做的这是什么呢？”女人说：“那蛇引诱了我，我就吃了。”
